findings.evidence: `rg` hits: `TauCeti/Analysis/PDE/UniformEllipticity.lean:308: lemma quadraticForm_nonneg`, `:388: lemma add_nonnegative`; Mathlib examples include `IsStrictlyPositive.add_nonneg` and many `_of_nonneg` names.
findings.fix: Rename it to `UniformlyEllipticOn.add_nonneg` and update the docstring list and the call in `add_smul_one`.
findings.issue: `UniformlyEllipticOn.add_nonnegative` spells out `nonnegative`, while adjacent TauCeti and Mathlib theorem names use the standard suffix `nonneg`.

summary: One introduced theorem name uses nonstandard terminology for Lean/Mathlib theorem names; the rest of the new names and notation are acceptable for this angle.
